TenantApplicationReleaseArtifactType.description: Same set as ApplicationReleaseArtifactType. Each row holds the effective definition (base + tenant overrides merged).

TenantApplicationReleaseArtifactDefiniti.description: One row per piece of the effective tenant application release. Stored in a separate resource/table from TenantApplicationReleaseDefinition. Built by copying app release artifacts and referenced extension release artifacts, then merging tenant overrides; all content for this tenant app release lives here for co-location and caching.

tenantApplicationReleaseId.description: Tenant application release this artifact belongs to.

definitionId.description: Id of the definition: applicationId for artifactType application; extensionId for artifactType extension; entity id, page id, etc. for other types.

extensionId.description: Set for content that came from an extension (namespaced). Null for app-owned content and for artifactType application or extension.

snapshot.description: The effective definition JSON (base + tenant overrides merged). Validates against the application meta model.
